_comment: Forge pipeline configuration for commands-to-skills migration (v6.0.0)
_provenance: Generated by Phase 0 meta-agent based on task analysis

1_research_questions.description: Generate research questions for migration scope analysis

2_research_answers.description: Answer research questions by exhaustive file analysis — cross-ref inventory, splitting analysis, test classification

3_brainstorm.description: 3-persona debate on frontmatter strategy, splitting, cross-ref updates, test migration, ordering

4_spec.description: Complete migration specification — file manifest, frontmatter rules, splitting boundaries, cross-ref rules, test updates

5_tdd.description: Update 25 affected tests, rewrite 10 logic-dependent tests, create 3-4 new migration validation tests

6_plan.description: Dependency-ordered implementation plan with 4 waves, checkpoints, and rollback strategy

7_execute.description: Execute migration in waves — file moves, splitting, cross-ref updates, cleanup
7_execute.jit_reason: Execution tasks are mechanical and well-specified by Phase 6 plan — agents can be spawned on demand per wave

waves.name: wave-1-small-files
tasks: Migrate 19 files under 200 lines with frontmatter transformation

waves.name: wave-2-large-files
tasks: Migrate and split 6 files over 200 lines

waves.name: wave-4-cleanup
tasks: Remove commands/, version bump, new tests, final validation

8_verify.description: 4-dimension verification: file structure, content preservation, cross-ref integrity, test suite health

9_completion.description: Changelog, roadmap update, final checklist, commit strategy, summary report

triggers.description: If more than 5 tests fail after cross-ref updates, re-analyze the failing tests and produce targeted fixes
If verification finds stale commands/ references, add targeted fix tasks to wave 3

model_selection.opus_reason: Spec and plan require architectural judgment — splitting boundaries, frontmatter decisions, migration ordering
model_selection.sonnet_reason: Research, execution, and verification are systematic/mechanical tasks that don't require deep reasoning

risk_mitigation.primary_risk: Cross-reference completeness — missed commands/ references cause test failures
risk_mitigation.mitigation: Phase 2 produces exhaustive inventory; Phase 8 greps entire repo for stale refs
risk_mitigation.mitigation_2: Phase 8 validates total content preservation for all 6 split files
risk_mitigation.tertiary_risk: Test logic errors after path pattern changes
risk_mitigation.mitigation_3: Phase 5 produces updated tests; Phase 8 runs full test suite
